name: ci
purpose: Main CI: lint, type-check, test, build on push/PR to main. 4 jobs: lint, test (with coverage + Codecov), validate (gitleaks + pattern compliance + CANON/debt schema), build.
notes: build job needs: [lint, test, validate]. Validate job runs gitleaks inline. Firebase env vars needed for build step. validate:canon, audit:validate, docs:check are SoNash-specific npm scripts. Codecov upload conditional on non-fork.

name: codeql
purpose: CodeQL deep semantic analysis for JavaScript/TypeScript on push, PR, and weekly schedule.
notes: Entirely generic — no project-specific config. build-mode: none. Direct port candidate. Matches JASON-OS CLAUDE.md CodeQL gate. Weekly cron: Monday 3:17 UTC.

name: dependency-review
purpose: Dependency vulnerability scan on PRs to main; comments summary, fails on critical severity.
notes: Entirely generic. fail-on-severity: critical. Direct port candidate. Matches JASON-OS CLAUDE.md Dependency Review gate.

name: scorecard
purpose: OpenSSF Scorecard supply-chain security posture analysis on push to main and weekly Monday schedule.
notes: Entirely generic. publish_results: true. SARIF uploaded to Code Scanning. persist-credentials: false. Matches JASON-OS CLAUDE.md Scorecard gate.

name: semgrep
purpose: Semgrep static analysis using local custom rules from .semgrep/rules/; runs local rules + tests; uploads SARIF to Code Scanning.
sanitize_fields: .semgrep/rules/ (project-specific rules must be ported or replaced)
notes: No SEMGREP_APP_TOKEN — uses only local custom rules. pinned semgrep==1.67.0. Runs semgrep --test against tests/semgrep/. SARIF verifies non-empty output. No --error flag (findings informational). The workflow shell is portable; the .semgrep/rules/ content is project-specific (20 rules). Weekly cron: Wednesday 13:17 UTC.

name: sonarcloud
purpose: SonarCloud quality gate and security hotspot analysis on push/PR/manual dispatch.
notes: Fork PRs skipped. fetch-depth: 0 for blame info. sonar-project.properties contains all config. pull-requests: write for PR decoration. Matches JASON-OS CLAUDE.md SonarCloud gate.

name: deploy-firebase
purpose: Deploy Firebase Hosting, Cloud Functions, and Firestore Rules to sonash-app project on push to main or manual dispatch.
notes: Hardcoded projectId sonash-app. Two jobs: preview-deploy (pull_request_target, currently disabled via comment) and deploy (main push). Preview job uses vars.* (repo variables). Deploy job uses secrets.*. Credentials written to temp file + cleanup step. Deletes named deprecated functions. Not portable — product-specific orchestration.

name: auto-merge-dependabot
purpose: Auto-merge Dependabot minor/patch PRs using gh CLI squash merge when CI passes; skips major version bumps.
notes: Only runs when actor is dependabot[bot]. Uses GITHUB_TOKEN only. Entirely generic pattern. JASON-OS already has an equivalent. Matches JASON-OS auto-merge-dependabot.yml.

name: auto-label-review-tier
purpose: Assigns PR review tier labels (tier-0 to tier-4) based on changed files using scripts/assign-review-tier.js; posts comment with tier description.
notes: Tier system (0-4) is a SoNash review policy concept. The workflow shell is portable but the tier-assignment script is SoNash-specific. Inline github-script label management is generic. Comment text references docs/REVIEW_POLICY_ARCHITECTURE.md. Sanitize = replace tier script and tier descriptions.

name: backlog-enforcement
purpose: Check backlog health and security patterns; DISABLED 2026-04-16 post-TDMS migration; manual dispatch only.
notes: DISABLED: triggers reduced to workflow_dispatch only per comment (Session #284, 2026-04-16). References SoNash-specific TDMS (MASTER_DEBT.jsonl) and audit backlog system (DEBT-0891, DEBT-0398). Not portable.

name: cleanup-branches
purpose: Delete merged branches older than 7 days from origin; weekly Monday 6am UTC + manual dispatch.
notes: Entirely generic shell script. Uses git CLI only. Protected patterns: main, develop, release/. Requires contents: write. Matches JASON-OS cleanup-branches.yml exactly. Direct port.

name: docs-lint
purpose: Lint changed markdown files on PRs to main using scripts/check-docs-light.js; posts results as PR comment.
notes: Triggered only on PR paths matching *.md or docs/**. continue-on-error: true on lint step. Errors block, warnings do not. Skips TEMPLATE.md and archive/ files. Comment updates existing bot comment (idempotent). Workflow shell portable; lint script is SoNash-specific.

name: pattern-compliance-audit
purpose: Weekly full-repo pattern compliance scan using scripts/check-pattern-compliance.js; creates GitHub issue if violations exceed threshold.
notes: SoNash-specific pattern compliance system. Threshold: 75 warnings or any blocking violations. Weekly Monday 6am UTC + manual dispatch. Not portable — requires SoNash pattern compliance infrastructure.

name: resolve-debt
purpose: Auto-resolve DEBT-XXXX items in MASTER_DEBT.jsonl when PRs with Resolves: DEBT-XXXX lines are merged to main.
notes: Triggers on pull_request closed (merged) to main. Extracts DEBT-IDs from PR body Resolves: lines. Commits debt resolution with [skip ci]. Uses git rebase for race conditions. Not portable — SoNash TDMS system.

name: review-check
purpose: Check if PR triggers review thresholds (commit/file count) using scripts/check-review-needed.js; posts warning comment and adds needs-review label.
notes: Uses unique heredoc delimiter to prevent output corruption. Exit codes: 0=no review, 1=review needed, 2=error. Idempotent comment updates. Workflow shell is portable pattern; thresholds and script are SoNash-specific.

name: sync-readme
purpose: Auto-sync README status badges from ROADMAP.md changes; creates PR via gh CLI and auto-merges.
notes: Triggered only on push to main affecting ROADMAP.md. Creates auto/sync-readme-<timestamp> branch, commits, auto-merges. commit --no-verify. cancel-in-progress: false (preserve serialization). Workflow pattern portable; script content SoNash-specific.

name: validate-plan
purpose: Validate phase completion documentation in INTEGRATED_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md when that file changes in a PR.
notes: Narrowly scoped to a single SoNash-specific file path. Not portable. Posts comment on failure explaining phase completion requirements.

name: dependabot
purpose: Dependabot version update config: weekly npm (root + /functions), monthly github-actions. Groups minor/patch updates.
notes: Three ecosystems: npm /, npm /functions, github-actions. /functions ecosystem is SoNash-specific. Root npm and github-actions sections are portable with minor sanitization.

name: CODEOWNERS
purpose: Automatic review assignment: all files, .github/workflows/, functions/src/, firestore.rules require owner review.
notes: Standard CODEOWNERS. Core pattern (* + .github/workflows/) is universally portable. Product-specific entries need removal or replacement.

name: pull_request_template
purpose: PR template with sections: What Changed, Why, How, Testing, Screenshots, Related Issues, Technical Debt (DEBT-XXXX Resolves: pattern), Breaking Changes, Risks, Checklist.
notes: Highly polished. TDMS Resolves: pattern integrates with resolve-debt workflow. Removing TDMS section yields a generic high-quality PR template. Directly useful as JASON-OS default.

name: release
purpose: Auto-generated release notes config with changelog categories: Breaking, Security, Features, Bug Fixes, Refactoring, Testing, Infrastructure, Dependencies, Documentation, Other.
notes: Generic release notes categorization. No project-specific content. Direct port candidate.

name: copilot-instructions
purpose: GitHub Copilot context file with full SoNash project overview, commands, architecture, patterns, and CI/CD workflow descriptions.
notes: SoNash product-specific. Contains Firebase project ID, app architecture, ~3776 test count, stack versions (Next.js 16.1, React 19, TS5, Tailwind v4). Not portable. .github/ is D16 scope per coverage matrix.

name: gitleaks-config
purpose: Gitleaks allowlist config: extends defaults, allows Firebase public API keys (context-aware regex), test JWT tokens, Sentry docs curl examples.
sanitize_fields: Firebase allowlist regexes (SoNash-specific public key patterns)
notes: Uses regexTarget=line for context-aware allowlisting. Core structure (path ignores for build artifacts) is portable. Firebase-specific regex allowlist needs review per target repo. Matches JASON-OS CLAUDE.md Gitleaks gate.

name: sonar-project-properties
purpose: SonarCloud project config: projectKey, organization, source dirs, exclusions, test inclusions, LCOV paths, 13 false-positive ignore rule groups, CPD exclusions.
notes: 13 false positive ignore groups (fp1-fp8, some lettered sub-variants). Current issue baseline: 778 (2026-01-13). LCOV path: coverage/lcov.info. The exclusion structure is a useful template even if specific rules differ.

name: codecov-config
purpose: Codecov coverage config: 65% project line threshold (blocking), 70% patch target (informational), ignores build artifacts and test files.
notes: Requires CODECOV_TOKEN secret. comment.require_changes: true. Version 1.0 (2026-03-18). Core structure is portable template; thresholds and ignore paths need per-project tuning.

name: pr-agent-toml-dot
purpose: Qodo PR-Agent config (dot-hyphen variant): pr_code_suggestions suppression for 5 known false-positive patterns related to hook security, atomic writes, audit logging.
sanitize_fields: All extra_instructions (SoNash-specific suppression rules referencing DEBT-2957/2958/2959)
notes: RESOLUTION: .pr-agent.toml (dot-hyphen) is a SHORT file with 5 suppression rules for pr_code_suggestions. .pr_agent.toml (dot-underscore) is the PRIMARY comprehensive config. Neither is obsolete. Dot-hyphen contains hook-security-specific suppressions. Both files are active and complement each other.

name: pr-agent-toml-underscore
purpose: Qodo PR-Agent primary config (dot-underscore): comprehensive reviewer/code-suggestion/compliance suppression for 29 known false-positive patterns plus global settings.
sanitize_fields: extra_instructions in all sections (SoNash-specific suppression rules)
Project context text in pr_reviewer extra_instructions
notes: 29 numbered suppression rules (last: Symlink TOCTOU). Audited 2026-03-01 (Phase 6 GATE-05). Rules 1-8 in pr_code_suggestions. 8 rules in pr_compliance_checker. custom_labels for security/performance/breaking are portable. The structure and approach is a high-value JASON-OS template.

name: qodo-pr-agent-toml
purpose: Canonical Qodo config in .qodo/ directory: 29 pr_reviewer suppressions + 4 pr_code_suggestions suppressions + 8 pr_compliance_checker rules.
notes: ARCHITECTURE: Three Qodo config files coexist. .qodo/pr-agent.toml is the primary Qodo config (per Qodo docs convention). The root .pr_agent.toml and .pr-agent.toml may serve PR-Agent app (separate product). .qodo/pr-agent.toml is most current (updated 2026-03-30, rules up to #29). REJECTED_PATTERNS.md lives in .qodo/ as companion. This is canonical.

name: qodo-rejected-patterns
purpose: Human-readable index of every Qodo suppression rule with origin PR numbers and rejection counts. Prevents false positives from drifting back.
sanitize_fields: All row content (SoNash-specific PR numbers and rejection rationale)
notes: Version 1.1 (2026-04-12). 28 reviewer suppression rows + 8 code-suggestion suppression categories. Two-engine explanation (Reviewer vs Custom Compliance) is portable methodology concept. JASON-OS should port the structure even if specific rules differ.

name: semgrep-rules
purpose: 20 custom Semgrep rules across 3 categories: correctness (7 rules), security (8 rules), style (5 rules). Includes taint analysis rules for path traversal and user-input-to-exec.
notes: 20 rules total. correctness/ (7): async-without-try-catch, file-read-without-try-catch, no-await-in-loop, no-floating-promise, no-race-condition-file-ops, no-unchecked-array-access, regex-without-lastindex-reset. security/ (8): no-unsafe-html-setter [XSS], no-direct-firestore-write, no-eval-usage, no-hardcoded-secrets, no-innerhtml-assignment, no-unsanitized-error-response, taint-path-traversal, taint-user-input-to-exec. style/ (5): no-any-type, no-console-in-components, no-default-export, no-inline-firestore-query, no-magic-numbers. Firebase-specific rules need replacement for non-Firebase projects. Most correctness and general security rules are portable to any JS/TS project.
